meta.title: Industrial Portfolio
meta.description: Utilitarian, technical, and precision-focused with modern responsive layouts

sections.headline: ENGINEERED SOLUTIONS
sections.subheadline: Robust systems with predictable outcomes. No magic, just solid engineering.

sections.heading: SPECIFICATIONS
sections.body:
Software engineering like mechanical: understand, design, implement, test, document.

Background: distributed systems, infrastructure, dev tooling. Focus: observability, maintainability, operational excellence. If it can't be measured, it doesn't exist.

Seattle-based. Infrastructure powering millions of requests/day. Systems that fail gracefully, scale horizontally.

items.title: MESSAGE QUEUE
items.description: Distributed message queue: 10M+ messages/day. Exactly-once semantics, dead letter queues, monitoring. Go + Kafka.

items.title: API GATEWAY
items.description: High-performance API gateway: rate limiting, circuit breaking, routing. 50K+ RPS. Rust + Kubernetes.

items.title: OBSERVABILITY STACK
items.description: Custom observability platform: metrics, traces, logs. Prometheus, Jaeger, Elasticsearch. Unified monitoring.

items.title: CI/CD PIPELINE
items.description: Internal dev platform for automated deployments. GitOps, progressive delivery, automated rollback. 80% deployment time reduction.

items.title: DATABASE MIGRATION
items.description: Zero-downtime PostgreSQL migration tool. Schema changes, data transformation, rollback. 5TB migrated without downtime.

items.title: SERVICE MESH
items.description: Service mesh for microservices. mTLS, traffic management, policy enforcement. Secured 200+ microservices.

items.title: LOAD BALANCER
items.description: Custom L7 load balancer: intelligent routing, health checks, autoscaling. 100K+ concurrent connections. Go.

items.title: LOG AGGREGATION
items.description: Centralized logging: 1TB+ daily logs. Real-time search, alerting, retention policies. ELK stack.

items.quote: Most reliable engineer I've worked with. Systems never break—or they fix it before anyone notices.
items.name: Sarah Kim

items.quote: Saved us $2M in infrastructure costs. Migration was flawless—zero downtime, zero data loss.
items.name: Marcus Johnson

sections.heading: INITIATE CONTACT
sections.subheading: Available for consulting and full-time roles. Open to infrastructure challenges.
